title: stylidium tenerum
intro: Stylidium tenerum, also known as the delicate triggerplant, is a small herbaceous plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the Stylidiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal various skin issues, such as wounds and eczema. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Stylidium tenerum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used topically as a poultice or cream to harness its medicinal properties.
